description.p: Wombat is a mobile-friendly and modern graphical interface for Numbat programming language, which is a high-precision scientific calculator with first-class support for physical units and dimensions. It lets you write expressions naturally, combine units safely, and convert results instantly. It knows about nearly all physical units and their dimensions, so you can work with real-world quantities without worrying about unit conversions. Wombat is built for scientists, engineers, students, and anyone who works with real-world quantities.

The app keeps a live Numbat session, displays previous calculations in a scrollable history, and provides quick access to examples, syntax help, constants, and completion suggestions. Calculations can mix ordinary mathematics with unit-aware conversions, so results stay dimensionally meaningful while the interface stays friendly.
Bug fixes and improvements in this release:

ul.li: Improved wide-window layout so the calculator output area uses the available space instead of leaving large empty margins.
Added operator buttons for fast input of common operators like "+", "-", "*", "/", "^" in a mobile device.

description.p: New features and improvements in this release:

ul.li: Added keyboard-only navigation for the Options panel, including an F10 shortcut and arrow-key movement between option buttons.
Added a standard libadwaita Keyboard Shortcuts dialog from the Options panel.
Improved completion suggestions so Tab opens suggestions, a second Tab focuses the first suggestion, and Up and Down move between suggestions instead of command history while the popup is open.

description.p: New features and improvements in this release:

ul.li: Mobile friendly app design using libadwaita features
Added a Suggestions button for faster input
